productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Concord Round Beige Casual Shoes
description: An off-take from the 1980s Basketball shoe, the adidas Concord Round sneaker reimagines the former court star in a sexy streetwise design. With a metallic foiled suede and metallic ripstop on the collar, it's a fab addition to your wardrobe.UpperMetallic foiled suede upper with a suede toe guard and textile lining along the collarPerforations on the toe region and lateral midfoot for breathable comfortLacing system with a velcro closure for a snug, customised FitSynthetic leather strips forming the adidas patented 3-Stripes on either side of the lacing systemMildly padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
